title: Kovim Sticky Traps Pest Trap Pads Board - Large Extra Strong Sticky Trap for Multiple Insects in Indoor Outdoor Home Kitchen Garden Garage Commercial Home (A. 5 Pcs)
bullet_points: Multi-Pest Traps: 5-Pack Pest Boards Keep your home pest-free. Size/One Piece: 21cm x 31cm
Household Indoor Outdoor Use: Suitable for families, gardens, restaurants, bars, farms, offices, warehouses, kitchens, meeting rooms, behind appliances, under sinks, near garbage areas
Foldable Thicker Cardboard: Just separate the paper boards, and put some food in the middle of the board. Recommend Food: peanut butter, fruit, meat, cookies, cheese, sausage
The More The Merrier: Placing several traps in multiple locations will increase your likelihood of capturing. Putting 2-3 pieces in each place can be more effective
Fold Or Flat: The trap can be folded into a tunnel if used in narrow areas. Or leave it flat to fit into large spaces and have a larger surface area
